title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・厚き壁

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the race unfolds, a certain Umamusume
watches intently...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here she comes! Tearing past Sakura Chiyono
O to claim victory at the autumn Tenno Sho is—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I won't lose... I won't!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The outcome of the race is as good as decided,
so why...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Why do your eyes still burn with such intensity?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she's still in the lead! She's heading straight
for the goal... and she's wooon!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What incredible skills! Talk about a talented
racer. She's won the shield with a spectacular
show of power!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Chiyo...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's all right that you didn't win... I saw how hard
you were running...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Huff... Wheeze... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(The wall in front of me... it's too thick. There's
not a single gap in it that I can even begin to
grasp at...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(They're brimming with natural talent leagues
beyond anything I've ever had... I can see that all
too clearly now.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But so what if they've got natural talent? Who
cares about a little thing like that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I might be the plainest and most mediocre racer
out there, but there's no way I'm going to give up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't, because I swore I'm going to become her
rival!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...You're shining too bright, Chiyo. Why are you
trying so hard to reach me?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I can't look away from your reaching hands and
brilliant eyes. And to think all that energy is
directed squarely at me...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Your fangs are bared and your gaze pinned on a
single target. When you stare at me with those
eyes like a starving wolf...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...I can barely think straight.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I didn't win.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
choice_data_list:
So which G1 race do you want to prove yourself
in next?

So which G1 race do you want to prove yourself
in next?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Thank you, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But before we decide that, I have something I
need to say to someone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Sakura Chiyono O asks Maruzensky
to meet her on the roof.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen, you came to watch the autumn Tenno
Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Of course. You were running in it, after all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'm sure you know there's something I
want to tell you, then.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I know I'm still not good enough for you to
consider me a rival.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But if you tell me to my face that I'm not enough,
then I'll train more intensely than ever.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If you say you need time to think, then I'll wait
until you're ready.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'll keep running until I reach your heart.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And to back up those words, I have a proposal to
make.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: There's a certain race I want to run in with you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's a G1 turf race in Tokyo that measures a
classic distance of 2,400 meters. It fits all the
criteria of your dream race—the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm talking about the autumn festival where the
best of the best from around the world
compete—the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
However, I know that I don't have the skill it
takes to compete against you yet.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So when next year comes, and it's time for the
Japan Cup...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Please race me there with all you've got.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The wind blows past them, and though it's only a
moment, it feels so much longer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Throughout their conversation, the sun has been
slowly sinking lower toward the horizon, and it
glints...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
How blindingly bright... I can't pretend not to see,
can I?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My peak has already passed, and unlike the sun in
the sky, I doubt I will ever be able to reach my
zenith again.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A breath of time passes, then Maruzensky tears
the envelope she's been holding into pieces.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I hope you'll still wait for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with those words, their promise with each
other takes on a new form.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thanks for coming, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're the only one who would praise me
for something like that.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for deciding our next goal without
discussing it with you.
choice_data_list: Don't sweat it. It's your path, after all.
Don't sweat it. It's your path, after all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.
choice_data_list: As your trainer, it's my job to support you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Heh.... Haha! Trainer, you're really too much...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Still, I'm glad I have you in my corner.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, we've only got a year to prep, so let's get
started.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to get stronger, and I want to kindle
Maruzen's passion for running too. What G1 race
do you think I should tackle next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stare into her expectant eyes and think. If her
plan is to come to fruition, we have two options.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A mile race would be good training to match the
Hot Rod's speed, which would point us to the
Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Alternatively, we could hone Chiyono O's racing
instincts against stronger opponents in the
medium-distance Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Right now, I think our best choice is to go with...
choice_data_list: Let's do a mile race—the Yasuda Kinen.
Let's do a medium race—the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Goal Race is now the Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Got it! Let me pencil that down in my Chiyonotes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we decide to compete in the Yasuda
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Goal Race is now the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Got it! Let me pencil that down in my Chiyonotes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we decide to compete in the
Takarazuka Kinen.
